name: Crab Quesadillas
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Fresh cooked lump crab meat
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the butter and oil in a medium saucepan. Heat over low heat until melted.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the garlic and onion. Saute over medium-high heat for about 3 minutes, or until translucent.
3. Stir in the chili, crab, mayonnaise, salt, and cilantro. Mix well.
4. To soften tortillas, place them on a heated grill or skillet for about 15 seconds on one side, then turn. Brush one side with the butter-oil mixture.
5. Spread half of the crab mixture onto one half of each tortilla, and top with a tablespoon of grated cheese.
6. Repeat until all tortillas are filled.
7. Heat a large saute pan or skillet over medium-high heat and cook for about 2 minutes on a side, or until golden brown. Alternatively, preheat oven to 375°F (190°C) and bake on a cookie sheet for about 5 minutes, until tops are golden brown.
8. Cut into quarters and serve.
